title: Lifesteal Experience
description: This is a modpack to simulate the lifesteal experience
body:
**A modpack to simulate the lifesteal experience** _Use the lifesteal mod to manage the heart system and revive ability
Have Simple Voice Chat to make everything more immersive
And make your server like you're playing on the real ONE!
_ # Setting up the modpack Everything is happening in the config folder. The lifesteal-common.toml file contains the lifesteal config. The basic things you can configure are:
- Starting Hearts
- How many hearts do you lose on death, or how many do you get on a kill
- If you drop a revive head on complete elimination
- The Complete Dead people if they get banned or are in spectator mode
- How many seconds to auto-revive
- When to lose hearts (By Mobs, Environment, or people)
To set up Simple Voice Chat, go to the config file and change the port to the one your server has
Please keep in mind that I won't provide any help on configuration, and you can check the mod here: https://modrinth.com/mod/lifesteal-mian or for the Voice Chat here: https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat **And now you are done configuring the basics!**
